extra.reason: Ratified: 1Password service account is the primary boot-secret source, with the chmod-600 env-file fallback as the sanctioned alternative. Actual op-CLI service-account support is verified as an early step of T1 secrets (external lead time); if unavailable, ship v1.0 on the env fallback (only 2 secrets: Slack bot token + Anthropic key). Either path satisfies the requirement.

Ratified (fact verified against official 1Password docs 2026-07-11): 1Password service account is the primary boot-secret source — OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN gives fully non-interactive op-CLI auth suitable for a launchd daemon at boot; rate limits are a non-issue for 2 startup secrets. chmod-600 env-file fallback remains sanctioned. Implementation notes captured in the decision design (use vault+item IDs; clear OP_CONNECT_*; provision token outside any repo).

Ratified: week_key = anchor Sunday's date in the pinned TZ (e.g. '2026-07-12'), per ADR 0002 D1 — dodges ISO Monday/Sunday boundary confusion given the Sunday trigger, human-readable, sorts chronologically. Used as the session PRIMARY KEY. Depends on pinned TZ + trigger time (T1 config).

Ratified: leave count-with-package-size in the raw ingredient line for v1.0 (ADR 0001 / SPEC §5.1 default). raw is retained losslessly, so v4.0 grocery aggregation can parse it or retrofit a structured package_size field then. Not consumed in v1.0.

Ratified: failed-week recovery is a daemon CLI subcommand 're-run <week_key> [--force]' that clears/overwrites the failed row and calls generateForWeek(force=true), reusing the dev force-regenerate path (T1 profile). Avoids raw row-deletion; keeps a clean audit. Per ADR 0002 open item.
Scaffold complete: pnpm+Vitest+Biome, ESM, Node22, TS 5.9.3 strict/NodeNext, dir skeleton, smoke test green. Commits 612e715 (scaffold) + ef1c356 (pinning fixes). Review clean after fix loop.

Config system + boot validation complete: typed zod schema, strict IANA tz validation (Intl.DateTimeFormat), HH:MM trigger, exact SPEC §9.3 defaults, error aggregation. Commit 7e10ea3. Review Approved (Minor nits only, tracked for final review).

Agent SDK harness complete: LlmClient seam (only src/llm imports the SDK), Sonnet-5 gotchas enforced via real assertions, usage aggregation across turns, SDK shape verified vs installed .d.ts. Commit 42f09c9. Review Approved.

dev/prod profile switch complete: resolveProfile bundles channelId/sqlitePath/forceRegenerate/postMode with SPEC §7 isolation enforced (no cross-profile fallback, #name rejection, distinct sqlite paths, collision throws). Matches config.ts validation style. Commit fa631a7. Review Approved (Minor nits only).

Secrets loading complete: 1Password SA (op read, OP_CONNECT_* cleared unconditionally) + env fallback, only the 2 v1.0 secrets, no-leak enforced (never reads rejection reason; adversarial test) + execFile args array. Commit b71640e. Review Approved (no Critical/High).

Daemon + in-process scheduler complete: DST-correct croner scheduler with error containment, injected onTrigger/onStartup seams for E3, boot secret-load timeout, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY wiring, pmset sleep-check, launchd plist. Commits d8d1dbe + 160286c. Review Approved after fix loop (Important+Medium fixed).

Per-turn SDKAssistantMessage.error now throws immediately (first-error-wins, named error type, no secrets); non-success final result includes SDKResultError.errors[]; dead usage guard dropped. TDD, all 4 gates green. Commit 481cd7f on build/phase-1-foundation.

Project Foundation & Runtime complete: all 7 tasks done (scaffold, config, Agent SDK harness, dev/prod profile, secrets, daemon+scheduler, harness hardening). Reviewed via SDD; 79 tests green on build/phase-1-foundation.

Frozen recipe schema complete: shared value types + Ingredient + two-tier RecipeCandidate/Recipe as zod schemas with z.infer TS types (single source of truth). Exact ADR 0001 fidelity, no package_size (ratified→raw). Commit 809d622. Review Approved (Minor nits only).
Implemented notes-reader (osascript/JXA), transformers.js embedder, sqlite-vec vector store, and hash-gated sync. 147 tests pass; typecheck/lint/build clean.

Ingest-time extraction pass complete: extraction.ts (LLM→ExtractedFields, strict validation, 1 bounded repair retry) + structured-store.ts (note_id cache, hash+extractor_version gated) + sync wiring with per-note error isolation. Commit 9e1767b. Review Approved (Moderate/Minor findings → follow-up filed).

search_recipes complete: vector search + deterministic post-filters (fail-closed active_max w/ confidence threshold, veg_status/season/effort), lightweight RecipeCandidate (no ingredients), exclude_ids passthrough, over-fetch to refill limit. Commit 755d081. Review Approved (minor untested branch combos only).

get_recipe complete: full Recipe assembly (note meta + structured fields incl. ingredient block), RecipeSchema-validated, null for unknown/not-ready. Added VectorStore.getNote getter. Commit 92218b7. Review Approved (nits only).

Deterministic pool composition complete: weeknight (active_max) + weekend pools, veg-floor top-up capped to deficit, best-effort untested injection, dedupe by id, no LLM. Commits a008ded + eddbc8b (veg-floor cap fix). Review Approved after fix loop.

PlannerInput + selection prompt complete: typed input (slots/pools/household/season/untested_present) + buildSelectionPrompt (TASK/HOUSEHOLD/SLOTS/CANDIDATES/RULES(HARD/SOFT/POOL)/OUTPUT), conditional untested+season clauses, candidates render soft-signals, household caller-supplied. Commit 1b9b265. Review Approved (Minor coverage nits only).

WeekPlan schema + single LLM selection complete: zod WeekPlan/SelectedMeal/VegPath (discriminated union, day:null) + llmSelect (one runQuery, JSON extract, shape-validate, PlanSelectionError no-leak). Shared json-extraction.ts refactor (byte-identical, no regression). Commit 44192a1. Review Approved (nits only).

Post-validation + bounded repair complete: validateWeekPlan (counts/membership-by-slot/veg-consistency/no-dupes-incl-second_dish/flag-sanity) + selectValidatedPlan (<=2 LLM calls, PlanValidationError secret-safe). .strict() WeekPlan; summarizeZodError consolidated to src/lib/zod-errors.ts. Commit 494e619. Review Approved (adversarially verified; test-coverage gaps only).

get_recipe enrich + buildPlan entry complete: enrichPlan attaches Recipe/secondDishRecipe (concurrent, throws EnrichmentError on null), buildPlan chains composePools→buildPlannerInput→selectValidatedPlan→enrichPlan with SAME pools into select+validate, generic v1.0 seed. Commit 5b2d448. Review Approved (verified end-to-end).

SQLite session store complete: ADR 0002 schema + typed SessionStore (insert/get/update-partial/getByThreadTs/close), caller-supplied clock, JSON working_plan, parameterized SQL. Commits b49022a + be69552 (test strengthening: same-file reopen idempotency + falsifiable no-clobber partial update). Review Approved.

week_key computation complete: currentPlanWeek/previousPlanWeek/triggerMoment/isActiveWeek (luxon, DST-correct, injected clock). tz/DST independently verified by review. Commits a4cd9b9 + 863db25 (pinned trigger-boundary + UTC/local + Monday edge tests). Review Approved.

State machine + generateForWeek complete: ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS + guarded transition(), idempotency gate, write-before-post ordering (tested via post-time row assertion), failed/suggested paths, expiry piggyback. Commits 09184a3 + 93c6438 (fix: return 'generated' on recovered write not rethrow; guard cosmetic expiry; retry breadcrumb). Review Approved after fix. Low follow-ups → bd6.7.

Startup catch-up (onStartup) complete: three ADR 0002 D4 cases — no-row-past-trigger→generate, no-row-before-trigger→noop, live→resumeQuietly, stale generating→alert-once+failed (no auto-repost, proven), terminal→noop. Single now(). Commit d34416f. Review Approved (unreachable-branch claim proven correct; nits only).

resume-quietly complete: pure ActiveSession reconstitution (parse+validate working_plan against composed EnrichedWeekPlanSchema, ResumeError on malformed, zero side effects). Commits 7502d37 + 02d72c3 (fix: generic JSON-parse msg no secret leak; OnStartupDeps.resumeQuietly →void so seam type-checks, negative-control verified; top-level .strict()). Review Approved after fix. Schema-dedup→bd6.8.

Operator re-run affordance complete: SessionStore.delete + reRunWeek (clears row then generateForWeek force:true; REFUSES non-failed rows w/o --force to prevent duplicate post — proven-tested) + parseReRunArgs. Commit 35f7d7e. Review Approved (safety guard proven; scope clean).

Test-file typechecking enabled: added tsconfig.test.json (includes tests, noEmit) + typecheck:test script, wired into CI. Surfaced + fixed 2 latent test-file type errors (generate.test.ts closure narrowing, search.test.ts missing ingredients). Part of CI setup commit.

WeekPlan→markdown render complete: pure deterministic renderPlan(EnrichedWeekPlan)→mrkdwn, slot-grouped, all VegPath kinds, flags/rationale/summary, newline-safe. Commit 984806c. Review Approved (minor: source-hint untested, no functional risk).

Daemon-boot integration complete: pure composeDaemon factory (builds real generateForWeek/onStartup, force from profile, currentPlanWeek trigger) + main() bootstrap (real stores/embedder/LlmClient/bound search+getRecipe/buildPlan/SessionStore, dry-run post via renderPlan + synthetic ts, console alert). Placeholders removed. Commit 816626e. Review Approved (wiring field-accurate, gates re-run; household nit Low/non-blocking).

Token/$ tracking complete: CostMeter + costUsd + meteredLlmClient decorator; generateForWeek persists per-run token_spend/cost_usd (reset-per-run, incl. failure path) via additive spendPatch; one shared meter threaded through composeDaemon. Commit 3fb7478. Review Approved (generate.ts verified byte-additive; crash-safety intact). Minor→fkg.2.

Per-run $ cap complete: CostCapExceededError + enforcement in meteredLlmClient (after-record, strict >, capUsd=config.generationDollarCap), reuses existing generateForWeek failure/alert path (generate.ts 0 diff lines — verified), CostMeter now names model in error. Commit 2517446. Review Approved (minor: boundary test + index smoke gap, tracked).

Slack poster complete: SlackPoster (Web API chat.postMessage, injectable client, renderPlan text, returns ts) + main() post-mode wiring (post→real, dry-run→placeholder). Commits 7c11583 + a1d1663 (surface safe err.data.error code, no token leak — verified). Review Approved after fix. bj1.1 app-creation is user's runtime step.

Wired syncNotes into the daemon (makeBuildPlanWithSync runs sync before buildPlan, once per real generation, proceed+alert on failure) + added standalone `pnpm sync` (sync-cli.ts). Shared runSync factory. MP_RECIPES_FOLDER env var. 430 tests, CI green, merged to main via PR #3.

Slack app created in Backhaushold (bot token, chat:write only — no Socket Mode); channels #meal-plan/#dev-meal-plan/#agent-alerts created. Verified 2026-07-15: chat.postMessage to #dev-meal-plan returned ok:true (op:// refs resolve, token+scope+membership work). Caveat: only #dev-meal-plan posting was exercised; confirm the bot is also invited to #meal-plan and #agent-alerts before the first prod run.

Fixed + verified live: notes-reader bulk-reads id/name/modificationDate/plaintext (was per-property-per-note => ~4min hang returning 0), uses plaintext() not image-laden body() HTML, trims folder-name matching, adds 180s timeout + 64MB maxBuffer. readNotes('Recipes') -> 798 notes in 0.8s; end-to-end pnpm sync on 'Untagged Recipes' stored all 20. Merged PR #6 (eea6237). NOTE: live sync surfaced a separate extraction problem (empty fields, high token cost) — see q95.6.

Root cause: agent-sdk-client left settingSources unset, so the SDK loaded the dev's CLAUDE.md + .claude settings + default tools into every call (~22k input tokens, 13x blowup) and framed the model as a coding agent => empty/degenerate extraction. Fixed: settingSources:[] always + tools:[] for plain completions. Also fixed usage accounting (was summing under-reporting assistant turns => ~6 output tokens/note; now reads authoritative cache-inclusive usage from the result message). Verified live: input ~1.6k, extraction returns correct populated fields (veg_status/ingredients/times). Merged PR #7 (dea2845). Follow-ups: q95.11 (cache-aware cost rates); initial full sync ~$21 for 798 notes needs a raised MP_GENERATION_DOLLAR_CAP.

Fixed: buildSelectionPrompt now specifies the exact WeekPlan output shape (root week_key with real value + meals[] + summary?; per-meal slot_type constrained|relaxed, recipe_id, title, day:null, veg union, flags[], rationale) and forbids the week_plan envelope; SLOTS wording uses the real enum. Root cause was an unspecified output shape + slot_type weeknight/weekend vs schema constrained/relaxed + missing week_key. Verified live against the 50-recipe index: selection returns a schema-valid WeekPlan that renders a full 6-meal veg-covered plan. Merged PR #8.

Implemented + live-verified: NoteStore hashtag reader (notes-tags.ts) + pure tag->metadata (tag-metadata.ts); tags merged at query time in search (authoritative for course/quality/season/effort, veg positive-override, LLM fallback); structured-store stores tags independently (upsertTags + tags_json migration); sync refreshes tags every pass (no re-extraction); pools exclude non-dinner courses. Verified: #side potato salad excluded from mains; rationales cite real #N-stars. 454 tests. Merged PR #9. Follow-ups: slim extraction prompt (drop tag-owned fields); side+main pairing.

Slimmed extraction: ExtractedFields={time,ingredients,veg_status}; prompt drops quality/season/effort (tags own them). EXTRACTOR_VERSION 1->2 (forces one re-extraction, batched before the full sync). search+get-recipe source season/effort/quality from tags; get-recipe now tag-consistent. 455 tests. Merged PR #10.
